# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Resources:
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties: 
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-0abcdefgh123456789
      KeyName: MyKeyPair
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sdh
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 100
            DeleteOnTermination: true

  AdditionalInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties: 
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-0abcdefgh123456789
      KeyName: MyKeyPair
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sdh
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 100
            DeleteOnTermination: true

Parameters:
  KeyName:
    Description: The EC2 Key Pair to allow SSH access to the instance
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    ConstraintDescription: Must be the name of an existing EC2 KeyPair.
